channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin traders reveal key levels as BTC price passes $63K after Trump Iran 'deal' comments
item.description: Bitcoin gained new upside targets for the daily close and beyond after US president Donald Trump said that Iran "wants to make a deal."

item.title: AI contracts, not bitcoin, now drive miner valuations, and Cipher and TeraWulf look cheap
item.description: Compass Point analysts Michael Donovan and Ed Engel said markets are giving little credit to future AI data center pipelines despite billions of dollars in signed leases.

item.title: MARA Stock Pops as Bitcoin Miner Agrees to Acquire Massive Powered Texas Land Plot
item.description: MARA Holdings has agreed to purchase a sizable plot of land in Texas to power its Bitcoin mining and growing AI compute ambitions.

item.title: Labour MPs Push to Make UK Crypto Donation Ban Permanent
item.description: The lawmakers have tabled amendments to make the current moratorium permanent, as the fallout over Reform UK's funding widens.

item.title: Ethereum's newest nonprofit wants to become Wall Street's guide to crypto
item.description: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re digging into Ethereum Institutional, a new nonprofit aimed at educating financial institutions and banks about Ethereum.

item.title: New asset now available to trade on Robinhood Crypto. $SENT (Sentient) - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9pRTV1eVQ2NFBxX25WUF8yUnR6YUVHZE5aUV9TSzAxS3ltZk9pSk80aEVMeU1tYmpsSFNOdW9Ib1E1cDlfZzBPdkEyM05KTHQ1OUxPQ1lxTVZEaVV3eWF6LXFRMA?oc=5" target="_blank">New asset now available to trade…

item.title: Bitcoin’s quantum dilemma: Bigger blocks or STARK proofs?
item.description: Dealing with large post quantum signatures slowing down Bitcoin can be solved with bigger blocks, or aggregating signatures using STARK proofs.

item.title: Aave rolls out vaults for yield-hungry fintech investors
item.description: Aave's new Stable Vaults product lets wallets, exchanges and payment apps offer yields on stablecoin deposits

item.title: MoonPay Brings Its AI Crypto Agents to Telegram
item.description: MoonAgents lets users analyze markets and prepare crypto transactions through Telegram while keeping keys on their own devices.

item.title: Age verification is the surveillance nobody voted for
item.description: KOSA and Chat Control both retreated on their most-criticized measures this week, but both kept mandatory age verification, the quiet mechanism that turns anonymous browsing into identified browsing for all of us, argues Billions CEO Evin …

item.title: Hong Kong regulator orders new anti-phishing measures for crypto platforms
item.description: Hong Kong’s regulator has ordered crypto platforms and online brokers to meet newly issued phishing-resistant login requirements within the next 12 months.

item.title: Morning Minute: Paradigm Raises $1.2B Fund as Crypto’s Top VC Pushes Into AI
item.description: BNB Chain rebuilds itself for a world run by AI agents. BTC ETFs flows flip negative. And prediction markets face a new hurdle.

item.title: EU Set to Revise MiCA in 2027 to Cover Foreign Stablecoin Issuers
item.description: Trump's embrace of stablecoins is pushing Brussels to expand its crypto law to non-EU issuers and tokenized payments, EU diplomats say.

item.title: Over $7.2 billion have migrated from LayerZero to Chainlink CCIP as Mantle joins exodus
item.description: Migrations to Chainlink CCIP so far include Kelp and Lombard, both of which brought over $1 billion, as well as Solv Protocol, Virtuals, Re and Kraken’s tokenized assets.

item.title: Pricing houses in bitcoin exposes dollar's loss of value
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 9, 2026

item.title: Digital Credit is transparent because the principal market risk factor is Bitcoin, an observable, homogeneous asset. Analysts can assess BTC-related credit risk continuously, and investors can apply their own statistical models to inform valuation and trading de - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1HWndLYWVUYkU3Vk0tSzlOWkdtNjJNNTVuUzUwTDB0WUYwRUNfWGFHUWpFQ3hCVkpCSU5KaXd1M1hKdXZZajZ4aVg0WGxDc2oycmwtTkVSRTVTa3c?oc=5" target="_blank">Digital Credit is transparent because the p…

item.title: Sony Bank gets US regulator nod to issue stablecoins
item.description: Sony Bank received preliminary approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a US stablecoin issuance business, with $40 million in starting capital.

item.title: Interpol operation exposes $122M crypto wallet tied to romance scam laundering
item.description: Interpol said a suspect's crypto wallet processed over $122.5 million in 10 months as authorities uncovered the scheme during a global anti-fraud operation that led to 5,811 arrests.

item.title: Swift rolls out new blockchain ledger to bring 24/7 banking to 17 global giants
item.description: HSBC, UBS, Wells Fargo and Citi are among the 17 banks now preparing to pilot live transactions using tokenized digital assets on Swift’s new blockchain payments platform.

item.title: Sony Bank Clears OCC Hurdle for Dollar Stablecoin
item.description: The lender's new US subsidiary, Connectia Trust, would issue a dollar-pegged stablecoin once it clears the regulator's final conditions.

item.title: Latin America’s biggest stock exchange now offers options on bitcoin, ether and solana futures
item.description: These options settle into underlying futures contracts rather than spot cryptoassets, involving no custody, transfer, or administration of tokens.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Q2 2026 Digital Asset Review
item.description: ETFs face record outflows

item.title: Crypto remains resilient in face of renewed Middle East tensions
item.description: BTC rose 1.2% to $63,000 and Nasdaq futures jumped 2.6% with markets seemingly unconcerned by U.S. airstrikes on Iran. Bitcoin is now up 9% since the end of June.

item.title: Revolut says USDT delisting is limited to EEA, Switzerland
item.description: Revolut said USDT support remains unchanged outside EEA and Switzerland as it winds down the stablecoin offering in selected European markets.

item.title: Singapore's Temasek investment fund says crypto is off the table, will focus on AI
item.description: The $400 billion wealth fund plans to expand AI holdings to 15% of its portfolio by 2031 from the current 6%.

item.title: SpaceX just moved Bitcoin for the first time in 6 months. A tagged SpaceX address sent a small BTC test transaction between two company-controlled wallets. Test transfers like these can precede larger treasury activity - but not always. Our research team brea - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1Wdl8wUC1lNjBBeHgzU1V2QjlXMk9oUnB4aEM4a3dyakNFWkJhWk1KODNUMlJtNXhxZjRyeXlrM0NTek8zVTdsZm1vOWtsZ3ZaWkFpSVVZdWdoR2M?oc=5" target="_blank">SpaceX just moved Bitcoin for the first tim…

item.title: Hyperliquid shows how onchain perps could challenge Wall Street: Pantera
item.description: Perpetual futures and Hyperliquid’s blockchain infrastructure are expanding into traditional asset classes with around-the-clock trading, according to Pantera Capital.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs end 'most overwhelming' $2.7B sell-off amid new $85M net outflow
item.description: Bitcoin spot ETFs posted a fresh net outflow on Wednesday as analysis said that their "most overwhelming" outflow streak had ended without a clear demand recovery.

item.title: Crypto trader applies legendary HODL strategy to EUR/USD forex bet
item.description: A trader on Ostium has held a $1.14 million long position in EUR/USD perpetual futures for 400 days, applying a bitcoin-style HODLing strategy to forex.

item.title: Sony secures conditional approval to set up U.S. stablecoin trust bank
item.description: The New York-based subsidiary, fully owned by Sony Bank, will be capitalized with $40 million to support its upcoming stablecoin business operations.

item.title: Two blockbuster AI IPO's on the horizon could leave crypto further behind
item.description: A wave of blockbuster AI listings is drawing billions of dollars from global investors, reinforcing a rotation away from crypto.

item.title: Bitwise 10 Crypto Index ETF (BITW) Adds HYPE, Removes DOT and AVAX Bitwise has officially added Hyperliquid (HYPE) to the Bitwise 10 Crypto Index ETF (BITW), the world's largest crypto index fund. Hyperliquid posted strong performance in the first half o - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5wd1lUQkE5eWlBWUpFQ0RJWHNvM0lrQTFTLUZxSFNuNXZGSkktMHcyX3ZWOU1tU1RvQVNEd1BEbEZWaXlfd0k1Y2tNSkZydnhmTGRUSm9pTWlEcjYteE9yMFJDVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitwise 10 Crypto Index ETF (BIT…

item.title: A 20-Year-Old's Crypto Wallet Moved $123M in Romance-Scam Cash: Interpol Says
item.description: The two Thai arrests were part of Operation First Light, a 97-country sweep that logged 5,811 arrests and intercepted $293 million.

item.title: Bank of Korea stands firm on bank-led stablecoin push as deposit token pilots advance
item.description: The Bank of Korea reiterated its call for bank-led won stablecoin issuance while advancing deposit token pilots, as issuer rules remain a sticking point in South Korea’s digital asset bill.

item.title: Swift launches blockchain ledger with 17-bank tokenized deposit pilot
item.description: Swift launched its new blockchain ledger that will host a tokenized bank deposit pilot for 17 major banks seeking faster cross-border payments.

item.title: Bitcoin's dwindling exchange reserves don't pack the same bullish punch anymore
item.description: Santiment reported that bitcoin supply is at its lowest since 2017 and ether since 2015, adding that it doesn’t guarantee prices will move higher but helps set up crypto’s next bull cycle.

item.title: Regulators invited Binance to seek new licenses after MiCA setback, co-CEO says
item.description: Binance is exploring new licensing paths into Europe while continuing to expand its regulatory footprint in Asia, says co-CEO Richard Teng.

item.title: Russia's largest private bank Alfa-Bank tests crypto trading
item.description: Alfa-Bank is testing cryptocurrency trading for qualified investors as Russia moves toward regulating digital assets and banks prepare new crypto services.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin rises to $63,000, oil and bond yields drop as markets look past latest Iran dustup
item.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs lost a net $84 million on Wednesday, ending a three-day inflow run that had pulled in roughly $509 million

item.title: Bank of Japan may speed up rate hikes, pushing borrowing costs above 2%, ex-BOJ official warns
item.description: Former BOJ official issues interest-rate warning as yen continues to slide against the dollar.

item.title: A trader turns $800 into over $1 million on Robinhood's brand new blockchain betting on memecoin
item.description: Robinhood's blockchain went live on July 1 to move stocks onchain. Its first breakout hit is a memecoin named after the mascot the company abandoned.

item.title: Most people are missing the ETH angle behind Robinhood Chain. At first glance, it may seem like Robinhood launching its own chain has little to do with $ETH. The activity happens on Layer 2, fees are low, and users may never think about Ethereum mainnet. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5TOWpuOWhlb0xmc3FIVDFqQWxOZW9wOE9vY0NrdUpXVEdvVkFaSDlqTndoOFEyMkhmcXBXRnRHMi0wdHE2SHZFUFNheUc1UWpzN2FLUUJlZV9NR2h1eTJR?oc=5" target="_blank">Most people are missing the ETH angle …

item.title: Wyden urges Senate leaders to keep dev protections in crypto bill
item.description: Senator Ron Wyden has called on Senate leaders to ensure the Blockchain Regulatory Certainty Act remains in the CLARITY Act when it is brought to the floor.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Trader loses $1M after signing phishing token approval
item.description: Onchain scammers netted more than $14 billion last year, and approval phishing remains a primary attack vector.

item.title: AI is shortening the shelf life of crypto security audits, researchers warn
item.description: Hackers have also been exploiting the codebases of defunct decentralized finance protocols, draining millions of dollars in customer funds.

item.title: XRP holds near $1.10 as traders watch long-term breakout setup
item.description: XRP defended the $1.00-$1.05 support zone, but the near-term chart remains capped below resistance as analysts track larger wedge and channel patterns.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether steady, gold slides as U.S.-Iran tensions escalate again
item.description: Oil climbed for a third day and gold fell for a fourth while bitcoin is up 1.6% on the week.

item.title: AI boom fuels inflation fears, complicating Fed’s next rate move
item.description: Ongoing strong demand for AI infrastructure “would likely sustain upward pressure on prices for technology products and electricity,” Federal Reserve policymakers said.

item.title: Crypto VC Paradigm raises $1.2B to push into AI
item.description: Crypto venture firm Paradigm is widening its investment gaze toward AI and other frontier industries with its latest fund.

item.title: Mark Cuban-backed DeFi dashboard Zapper shutters after 7 years
item.description: Zapper provided crypto market data to over 2 million monthly active users and oversaw more than $13 billion in processed transactions during its peak.

item.title: Crypto could benefit if Fed steps in to backstop US stock market: Analysts
item.description: The size and scope of the US stock market “gives policymakers a strong incentive to backstop major drawdowns,” said Bitget Wallet COO, Alvin Kan.

item.title: The triage is the product: running AI agents against Ethereum's protocol code
item.description: Notes from the Ethereum Foundation's Protocol Security team on running coordinated AI agents against real protocol code, including how we organize the work, what holds up under scrutiny, and what client teams and security researchers can t…

item.title: The New Grok 4.5 Is Out. Elon Musk Says It Competes With Last Year's Claude Opus
item.description: SpaceXAI's new coding model is cheaper and faster than Anthropic and OpenAI's flagships—and by Musk's own account, at least one generation behind them.

item.title: The Robinhood Chain > Ethereum secures it > Arbitrum powers it > Robinhood brings millions onchain The next chapter of finance is programmable - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE83M1JXQy12NS1HOHZtczU4YnF3ZmwtenBEcnB2dUQyNXVHc0tXZ3JfTHFoNU4zaFF1MlVvcmNGS01Nb0F0WWMyLVlmeEhlSDhWYmw4OEJ0MG0tVHZrbXc?oc=5" target="_blank">The Robinhood Chain > Ethereum secures …

item.title: A crypto address was meant to be a destination. It became an identity. Share it once and you've handed over a permanent, searchable record of everything you've done and will do. No other financial system works this way. Your account number isn't your publi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1fSlZPb0Q2LXh1SEkxYzlqTjUtalZoa0lQY0tSdkZCRmp0UEdNUEJtaXNxMVQ1RVlDbTdGbUN6RHJWRThWSmVRMXBMUFlLNkFfSEpzLTl2OXgzdlp0ZGV4NWdGZlMxXzA?oc=5" target="_blank">A crypto address was meant …

item.title: Paradigm Raises $1.2 Billion Fund as Crypto VC Pushes Further Into AI
item.description: The investment firm said its fourth fund will back AI, robotics, and crypto startups as it broadens beyond digital assets.

item.title: TLDR; Solana is the spot market for crypto assets, RWAs, stablecoins, tokenized equities, and memes - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1NMFBGbTZzdlAybHpWYUt6U1JSc0VQYm5oNU1aTERXVFpOVTM1LXhLVHgzeXdFT1JhNnhwZlVDN1p1RVNGTzB0cG5iSTl3a3Uydm8tcnZyMFZNeWs?oc=5" target="_blank">TLDR; Solana is the spot market for crypto …

item.title: Bitcoin Stalls as Ethereum Flashes Worst Weekly Signal in Years: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin is looking slightly more optimistic but failed the breakout everyone was watching. Meanwhile, ETH just printed a weekly death cross for the first time in years.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs 'Turning a Corner' After Record Bleed Hits $8 Billion
item.description: Investors had backed away from Bitcoin since mid-May.
